name: Kawaguchi Chemical Industry Co., Ltd
summary: Kawaguchi Chemical Industry Co., Ltd manufactures and sells fine chemicals in Japan. The company offers organic rubber chemicals, such as vulcanization accelerators, antioxidants, curing agents, and other rubber chemicals; and synthetic resins, including antioxidants and polymerization inhibitors. It also provides dye pigment, pharmaceutical, and agrochemical intermediates; photo chemicals; and lubricant additives and corrosion inhibitors. Kawaguchi Chemical Industry Co., Ltd was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
